decisions.decision: Remove 11 unused public API wrappers from scripts/memory/__init__.py
decisions.rationale: These functions are exported in __all__ but never called externally by any workflow script or command: plan_to_task_descriptions, generate_implement_prompt, detect_file_conflicts, create_session, get_conflict_context, save_session, run_watchdog_checks, load_ledger, save_ledger, create_ledger, check_stale_tasks. Removing them reduces maintenance surface and confusion.

event-hardening (REVIEW-only, no CONTEXT/PLANs), context-engineering-fixes (CONTEXT + REVIEW but no PLANs/SUMMARYs), and overstory-workflow-patterns (3 PLANs without SUMMARYs, last touched 2026-02-14) are stale. Move to docs/planning/work/archive/ to declutter active feature space.

decisions.decision: Remove outdated Phase 3 stubs in memory/__init__.py
decisions.rationale: Comments referencing future Phase 3 work that has already been completed or superseded. Keeping them creates false expectations.

workflow_checks.py and workflow_validate.py use dynamic globals() re-export from *_core.py. This is intentional for backwards compatibility with existing commands that reference the wrapper paths. Not worth disrupting.
The specialized _repo_root(start) variant takes a start parameter for traversal, which serves a different purpose than the shared repo_root(). Functional difference, not duplication.

decisions.decision: Leave old config key references in historical planning docs
decisions.rationale: 32 references to karpathyChecklist/reviewPrinciples exist only in completed feature planning artifacts. These are historical records, not active code. Editing them would falsify the record.

constraints: All removals must pass workflow_validate.py after changes
Dead function removal must not break any import paths used by commands or skills
Archive directory must preserve original structure for auditability
Do not modify historical planning artifacts
